attributes.title: [PostgreSQL OTel] Query Performance
attributes.description: Query execution times, top queries from pg_stat_statements, temp file usage, and sequential scan rates.

"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] Query Performance

This dashboard monitors query performance:
- Temp file creation and I/O (queries spilling to disk)
- Buffer cache hit ratio
- Top queries by execution time and call volume
- Sequential scans (when available)
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "e89dd4ab-be84-3840-7c49-00d32fe4cbcb", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 10, "h": 4, "i": "e89dd4ab-be84-3840-7c49-00d32fe4cbcb"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Temp Files Created", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "110e231d-dabc-60a9-8f3a-332993534a2d", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "d68b10d7-9f92-87c5-a5e6-e27a906a9b01", "showBar": false}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
